title: Grit Swooper Map Render File Plan Boundary
forbids: Node filesystem write authority outside the Swooper map artifact file-plan writer
why: Packet 6 separates pure Swooper map artifact rendering from filesystem writes so catalog generation and future request-local generation can share one deterministic file-plan API.
remediate: Keep Swooper artifact rendering in buildSwooperMapArtifactFilePlan and route all filesystem mutation through writeSwooperMapArtifactFilePlan(plan, { outputRoot }).
message: Swooper map artifact filesystem ownership drifted from the file-plan writer boundary.
